name: 沈词

appearance.face: 白净如玉，俊朗清冷，五官端正
appearance.distinguishing_features: 琥珀色冷眸与讥诮冷笑

costume.typical_outfit: 深色文人长袍，官服或常服

visual_reference: handsome aloof Chinese scholar-official in ancient dynasty, cold amber piercing eyes, refined pale face, tall slender build, black hair tied with jade guan, dark elegant robes, highly detailed cinematic ancient drama style, 8k
personality: 清冷尖锐、端方持重、内心复杂
desire: 挽回妻子与女儿，弥补前世遗憾
flaw: 误会冷待、尖锐伤人、不善表达
arc: 从恨到后悔追妻，从冷漠到恬不知耻纠缠
scene_presence: 与女主对戏核心，从提亲到江南深夜爬床
